data.title: Rename skill directory, hook file, and update all source references to using-dso
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

TDD exemption: pure structural rename with no new conditional logic or behavioral content. The observable behavior of the startup hook injection is unchanged — same content injected, just from a different file path. Exemption criterion 2: the task is a change-detector/rename without altering observable behavior.

## What
Perform all git mv renames and content updates to complete the using-lockpick → using-dso rename. After this task, the test renamed in Task 1 turns GREEN, and grep returns zero using-lockpick matches across all .sh/.md/.json/.conf files (excluding CHANGELOG.md).

## Implementation Steps
1. `git mv plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick plugins/dso/skills/using-dso`
2. `git mv plugins/dso/hooks/inject-using-lockpick.sh plugins/dso/hooks/inject-using-dso.sh`
3. Edit plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md frontmatter: `name: using-lockpick` → `name: using-dso`
4. Edit plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/HOOK-INJECTION.md frontmatter: `name: using-lockpick` → `name: using-dso`
5. Edit plugins/dso/hooks/inject-using-dso.sh: replace all `using-lockpick` path refs → `using-dso`; update comment on line 2 to reference inject-using-dso.sh
6. Edit plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh:
   - Rename function: `hook_inject_using_lockpick()` → `hook_inject_using_dso()`
   - Update path variables: `using-lockpick/HOOK-INJECTION.md` → `using-dso/HOOK-INJECTION.md`; `using-lockpick/SKILL.md` → `using-dso/SKILL.md`
   - Update comments referencing using-lockpick
7. Edit plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/session-start.sh:
   - Update comment on line 11: `hook_inject_using_lockpick` → `hook_inject_using_dso`
   - Update function call on line 47: `hook_inject_using_lockpick` → `hook_inject_using_dso`
8. Edit plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task2.json: `inject-using-lockpick.sh` → `inject-using-dso.sh`
9. Edit plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task3a.json: same
10. Edit plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task3b.json: same
11. Edit plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task4b.json: same
12. Edit plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: replace `using-lockpick` → `using-dso` (the one string reference in the INJECTION_GUARD text)
13. Edit docs/reference/AGENT_POINT_SESSION.md: replace all `using-lockpick` → `using-dso`
14. Edit .test-index: remove RED marker bracket from test-using-dso-clarification.sh line
    (change `test-using-dso-clarification.sh [test_skill_md_has_clarification_section]` → `test-using-dso-clarification.sh`)
15. Verify: `grep -r "using-lockpick" . --include="*.sh" --include="*.md" --include="*.json" --include="*.conf" | grep -v CHANGELOG | grep -v ".git"` returns empty output

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/ (renamed to using-dso/)
  - SKILL.md (frontmatter name field)
  - HOOK-INJECTION.md (frontmatter name field)
- plugins/dso/hooks/inject-using-lockpick.sh (renamed to inject-using-dso.sh, internal paths updated)
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh (function rename + path references)
- plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/session-start.sh (comment + function call)
- plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task2.json
- plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task3a.json
- plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task3b.json
- plugins/dso/hooks/rollback/settings-pre-task4b.json
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- docs/reference/AGENT_POINT_SESSION.md
- .test-index (remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Skill directory exists at new path: plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/
  Verify: test -d plugins/dso/skills/using-dso
- [ ] Old skill directory does not exist
  Verify: test ! -d plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick
- [ ] Hook file exists at new path: plugins/dso/hooks/inject-using-dso.sh
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/hooks/inject-using-dso.sh
- [ ] Old hook file does not exist
  Verify: test ! -f plugins/dso/hooks/inject-using-lockpick.sh
- [ ] Function renamed in session-misc-functions.sh
  Verify: grep -q "hook_inject_using_dso()" plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh
- [ ] Old function name absent from session-misc-functions.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q "hook_inject_using_lockpick" plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh
- [ ] Function call updated in session-start.sh
  Verify: grep -q "hook_inject_using_dso" plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/session-start.sh
- [ ] Zero using-lockpick references remain in .sh/.md/.json/.conf files (excluding CHANGELOG and .git)
  Verify: ! grep -r "using-lockpick" . --include="*.sh" --include="*.md" --include="*.json" --include="*.conf" --exclude-dir=.git | grep -v CHANGELOG | grep -q .
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q "test-using-dso-clarification.sh \[" .test-index
- [ ] Test suite passes: test-using-dso-clarification.sh returns exit 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
